steps.one: Complete an online form to provide your basic personal details and select a photo ID you can take to a Post Office. We will then send you a confirmation email.
steps.two: Take the confirmation email and your photo ID to a Post Office.
steps.three: A member of Post Office staff will process your photo ID and take a photo of your face to verify your identity.

dataInfo.title: What happens after the Post Office
dataInfo.body: Once your identity has been proven, you must return online to your GOV.UK account to access the service you need.

nameEntry.title: Enter your name exactly as it appears on your photo ID
nameEntry.middleNameHint: Leave this blank if you do not have middle names

checkDetails.title: Confirm your details
checkDetails.name: Name
checkDetails.buttonText: I confirm my details are correct

unrecoverable.title: Sorry, there is a problem with the service
unrecoverable.subTitle: We cannot prove your identity right now.
unrecoverable.description: Go back to the service you were trying to use and start again. You can look for the service using your search engine or find it from the GOV.UK homepage.
unrecoverable.contactMeLink: Contact the GOV.UK account team (opens in a new tab)

pageNotFound.title: Page not found
content: If you typed the web address, check it’s correct.
If you pasted the web address, check you copied the entire address.
You can also go back to the service you were trying to use and start again. You can look for the service using your search engine or find it from the GOV.UK homepage.
Go to the GOV.UK homepage
Contact the GOV.UK account team (opens in a new tab)

validation.before: Your date of birth must be in the past
validation.after: Enter a valid date of birth
validation.numeric-day: Your date of birth must include a day that contains numbers only
validation.numeric-month: Your date of birth must include a month that contains numbers only
validation.numeric-year: Your date of birth must include a year that contains numbers only
validation.date-month: Your date of birth must include a month that is a number between 1 and 12
validation.required-day: Enter your full date of birth
validation.required-month: Enter your full date of birth
validation.required-year: Enter your full date of birth

validation.default: Make sure the details you entered match the details on your photo ID.

cookieBanner.title: Cookies on GOV.UK One Login
cookieBanner.heading: Cookies on GOV.UK One Login
cookieBanner.paragraph1: We use some essential cookies to make this service work.
cookieBanner.paragraph2: We'd like to set additional cookies so we can remember your settings, understand how people use the service and make improvements.

cookieBannerAccept.paragraph1: You've accepted additional cookies. You can

cookieBannerReject.paragraph1: You've rejected additional cookies. You can

cookie.cookieText: GOV.UK uses cookies to make the site simpler.
